package.name: dobi_npc_msgs
package.description: Custom messages and services for the Dobi Barista cafe NPC system. Includes EmotionState (Russell + Salichs), RapportEvent, MinigameResult, SetPersona, ModeState, SetMode, and the 5-state FSM extension (PatrolState, TableReport, GuidingState, OpEvent, OperatorCommand, GetTableStatus, SetPatrolSchedule).
